project_type: TypeScript monorepo with 13 apps, 39 shared packages, 18 infrastructure services
build_system: pnpm workspaces + turborepo. Build command runs tsc across all packages. Uses turbo task pipeline with ^build dependencies.
test_framework: vitest with describe/it/expect pattern, vi for mocks. Tests are colocated in __tests__ directories or alongside source. Pattern: service = new Service(); method-level tests.
verification_instructions: 1. pnpm install --frozen-lockfile, 2. pnpm typecheck, 3. pnpm test, 4. pnpm build, 5. pnpm lint
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. No Docker daemon needed for validation; use host-based TS typecheck/test/build. Services/ads-api is currently just a health stub.
contribution_requirements: Small reviewable diffs (<=500 LOC per PR). All gates must pass: install, typecheck, test, build, lint. Privacy by default. No cross-site tracking, strict CSP.
key_patterns: Services are class-based with dependency injection. Zod schemas for validation. Fastify for HTTP backends (via @quant/server-core). React TSX for frontends. Tests use vitest with beforeEach service instantiation. Packages export via barrel index.ts. Apps have src/ (frontend) and backend/ (API). Mobile modules live in apps/*/src/mobile/ as type+class files.
directory_structure: apps/ (13 apps with src/ frontend + backend/ API), packages/ (39 shared libs), services/ (18 infra workers, mostly health stubs), scripts/ (build/dev scripts), infra/ (k8s/terraform), k6/ (load tests)
